title: Sankalp Garib Kalyan Yojana Landing Page

requirements.text: Build a fixed top navigation header with the Sankalp Marg Foundation logo (use generated logo asset), navigation links to Home, Scheme Info, and Contact sections, a clickable phone number (7562038551) displayed in orange, and a 'Register' button styled as an orange rounded pill.

quotes: fixed w-full top-0 bg-white/95 backdrop-blur shadow-sm

acceptanceCriteria: Header is fixed at the top and remains visible on scroll.
Logo renders correctly in the header.
Navigation links scroll smoothly to their respective sections.
Phone number 7562038551 is clickable as a tel: link.
Register button is visible and styled with orange background and rounded-full shape.

requirements.text: Build a full-width hero section with an orange-to-white gradient background. Left side: a badge labeled 'Sankalp Marg Foundation', a large headline reading 'A New Pledge for the Poor — Sankalp Garib Kalyan Yojana', a supporting paragraph about free education, healthcare, and employment training for underprivileged families, an 'Apply Now' orange CTA button, and a green 'Call Now' button linking to tel:7562038551. Right side: display the generated hero image.
acceptanceCriteria: Hero section is two-column on desktop and stacked on mobile.
Headline, badge, description, and both CTA buttons are rendered.
'Apply Now' button is orange; 'Call Now' button is green and links to tel:7562038551.
Hero image is displayed with rounded corners and shadow.

requirements.text: Build a services section titled 'Our Key Services' with four cards in a responsive grid: (1) Free Healthcare — better treatment and free medicines for every poor family; (2) Quality Education — free books and scholarships for children; (3) Farmer Welfare — financial and technical support for farmers; (4) Employment Mission — training and livelihood support for women. Each card has a relevant Font Awesome icon in orange, a bold title, and a short description. Cards have a hover effect that highlights the border in orange and scales the icon.
acceptanceCriteria: All four service cards are rendered with correct icons, titles, and descriptions.
Cards are displayed in a 4-column grid on large screens, 2-column on medium, 1-column on small.
Hover effect changes border color to orange and scales the icon.

requirements.text: Build a dark footer (slate-900 background) with three columns: (1) Logo (inverted white version) with a tagline about the foundation's commitment to the underprivileged; (2) Quick links: Home, Scheme Info, Privacy Policy; (3) Contact details with icons — email: vishalkumar841456@gmail.com, phone: 7562038551, address: New Delhi, India. Include a copyright line '© 2026 Sankalp Marg Foundation. All Rights Reserved.'
acceptanceCriteria: Footer has three columns on desktop, stacked on mobile.
All contact details (email, phone, address) are displayed with appropriate icons.
Email and phone are clickable links.
Copyright text is displayed at the bottom.

requirements.text: Apply a consistent visual theme across the entire page: orange (#ea580c) as the primary brand color, slate-900 for dark sections, white and slate-50 for light backgrounds, bold black headings, and rounded card/button styling. Use smooth scroll behavior and subtle hover transitions throughout.
acceptanceCriteria: Orange is used consistently for CTAs, icons, accents, and hover states.
Smooth scrolling is enabled when navigating to sections.
Typography is bold and legible throughout.
Rounded corners are applied uniformly to cards and buttons.

constraints: All user-facing text must be in English.
Primary brand color must be orange (#ea580c).
nonGoals: No backend registration or form submission logic.
No multi-language or Hindi language toggle.

required: Sankalp Marg Foundation NGO logo — a warm saffron/orange circular emblem with an open hand and a glowing sun rising above it, representing service and hope, on a white background (sankalp-logo.dim_256x256.png)

Hero section photo — a warm, uplifting scene of diverse Indian community members gathered together in a village setting, soft golden-hour lighting, hopeful and welcoming atmosphere (hero-community.dim_800x600.png)
